{ "name": "spatie/macroable", "description": "A trait to dynamically add methods to a class", "keywords": [ "spatie", "macroable" ], "homepage": "https://github.com/spatie/macroable", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Freek Van der Herten", "email": "freek@spatie.be", "homepage": "https://spatie.be", "role": "Developer" } ], "require": { "php": "^8.0" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^8.0|^9.3" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Spatie\\Macroable\\": "src" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Spatie\\Macroable\\Test\\": "tests" } }, "scripts": { "test": "vendor/bin/phpunit" }, "config": { "sort-packages": true } }
